title: -Contract No. 32400122 Amendment: Buhler Commercial for Willard Park Clubhouse and Restroom Replacement Project

sections.recommendation:
Adopt a Resolution ratifying the action taken by the City Manager during the City
Council recess to increase Contract No. 32400122 by $30,000 for a not to exceed
amount of $6,861,067.
NEGATIVE EFFECT IF ACTION DELAYED UNTIL AFTER COUNCIL RECESS
A delay in action until after council recess would delay the completion of the Willard
Park Clubhouse and Restroom Replacement project.
sections.fiscal_impacts:
Funding for this contract amendment is available in the FY 2026 budget in the Measure
T1 project budget (Fund 511-52-545-000-0000-000-461-720003-PRWT122004). No
other funding is required, and no other projects will be delayed due to this expenditure.
sections.current_situation:
The contract with Buhler Commercial for the Willard Park Clubhouse and Restroom
Replacement Project was approved on December 12, 2023 for a total amount not to
exceed $6,831,067. Additional work was required to secure the HVAC and electrical
equipment in the outdoor public restroom. The City has negotiated a change order with
Buhler Commercial to complete this work. This work was not included in the original
contract scope due to an omission, but is necessary for the security and longevity of the
new equipment.
sections.background:
The project included the demolition of the existing 565-sf single-story clubhouse, trellis,
and public restroom and the construction of a new 3,301-sf single-story wood-framed
multipurpose community building, a stand-alone outdoor public restroom, and a trash
enclosure.

Page 2 of 3
RECESS ITEM
Contract Amendment: Buhler Commercial for the Willard Park CONSENT CALENDAR
Clubhouse and Restroom Replacement Project October 14, 2025
The Willard Park Clubhouse and Restroom Replacement Project is funded primarily by
Measure T1, the 2016 voter-approved bond measure for improvements to City
infrastructure and facilities.
The project was advertised for bids on Tuesday, October 3, 2023, and bids were
opened on November 14, 2023. The City received 7 bids, from a low base bid of
$6,210,061 to a high base bid of $8,435,000, and from a low of $6,418,925 to a high of
$8,513,000 for the base bid plus Additive Bid Alternates. The determination of the
lowest responsive and responsible bidder (Buehler Commercial) was based on the price
for base bid work, as indicated in the bid documents.
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
The new Willard Clubhouse will be all electric and is on track to receive LEED Gold. In
addition, the construction contract includes requirements to comply with the City’s
Environmentally Preferable Purchasing Policy and Construction and Demolition Waste
program of at least 50%.
sections.rationale:
This increase to the contract is necessary to perform work to secure the HVAC and
electrical equipment in the outdoor public restroom. The City does not have in-house
labor or equipment resources to complete this renovation project.
sections.alternatives:
None
CONTACT PERSON
Scott Ferris, Director, Parks Recreation & Waterfront,510-981-6700
Evelyn Chan, Supervising Civil Engineer, Parks Recreation & Waterfront, 510-981-6430
sections.attachments:
1: Resolution
Page 2
Page 3 of 3
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
CONTRACT NO. 32400122 AMENDMENT: BUHLER COMMERCIAL FOR THE
WILLARD PARK CLUBHOUSE AND RESTROOM REPLACEMENT PROJECT
WHEREAS, the Willard Park clubhouse is a Measure T1 project and is in need of
renovation; and
WHEREAS, the City has neither the in-house labor nor the equipment necessary to
undertake this project; and
WHEREAS, an invitation for bids was duly advertised on October 3, 2023, bids were
opened on November 14, 2023, and the City received 7 bids; and
WHEREAS, Buhler Commercial was determined to be the lowest responsive and
responsible bidder, and references for Buhler Commercial were checked out
satisfactorily; and
WHEREAS, on December 12, 2023, by Resolution NO. 71,136-N.S. the City Council
authorized Contract No. 32400122 with Buhler Commercial in an amount not to exceed
$6,831,067 for the Willard Park Clubhouse and Restroom Replacement Project; and
WHEREAS, a contract amendment is needed in the amount of $30,000 to complete the
change order work to secure the HVAC system at the outdoor public restroom; and
WHEREAS, funds are available in the FY 2026 budget in the Measure T1 Fund (Fund
511).
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that the
City Manager is authorized to execute an amendment to Contract No. 32400122 with
Buhler Commercial for the Willard Park Clubhouse and Restroom Replacement Project,
increasing the contract amount by $30,000, for a total amended amount not to exceed
$6,861,067. A record signature copy of any amendments to be on file in the Office of
the City Clerk.
